announcement.text: Delivery begins September 21st — spots fill up fast!

how_it_works.headline: How It Works
how_it_works.subtitle: Getting a beautifully decorated porch has never been easier. Here's everything you need to know.

steps.title: Choose Your Package
steps.description: Browse our curated seasonal packages — from cozy starter sets to grand harvest displays. Pick the size and style that fits your home and budget.

steps.title: We Deliver & Set Up
steps.description: Our team personally delivers your pumpkins and arranges them on your porch. We handle all the heavy lifting, styling, and placement — you don't lift a finger!

steps.title: Enjoy the Season
steps.description: Sit back and soak in all the fall feels! Your porch becomes the envy of the neighbourhood from late September right through to Halloween.

steps.title: We Pick It All Up
steps.description: When the season winds down, we come back in the first two weeks of November and collect everything. No mess, no fuss — just a perfect fall experience from start to finish.

how_it_works.delivery_banner_text: Deliveries run from September 21st to October 21st, 2026. End-of-season pickup is scheduled for the first two weeks of November. Book early — delivery spots fill up fast!

why_choose_us.headline: Why Choose Us?
why_choose_us.subtitle: We're more than just a pumpkin delivery service — we're your local Okanagan fall specialists.

features.title: Proudly Local
features.description: We're an Okanagan-based business through and through. Every pumpkin is sourced from local Okanagan farms, supporting our community and keeping your display fresh.

features.title: Farm-Fresh Quality
features.description: Our pumpkins are selected for size, colour, and quality. No grocery store pumpkins here — only the finest varieties hand-picked from local growers.

features.title: White-Glove Service
features.description: We do all the work — delivery, styling, and pickup. Our team arrives at a scheduled time and creates a display you'll love. Just sit back and enjoy!

features.title: End-of-Season Pickup
features.description: When the season is over, we come back and remove everything. Composted responsibly — because we love the Okanagan as much as you do.

features.title: Customizable Displays
features.description: Want something specific? We love a challenge! Tell us your vision and we'll create a custom arrangement that perfectly matches your home's style.

features.title: Satisfaction Guaranteed
features.description: We stand behind our work 100%. If you're not happy with your display, we'll make it right — no questions asked.

gallery.headline: Porch Inspiration Gallery
gallery.subtitle: From cozy cottage stoops to grand entryways, see what we've created for Okanagan families just like yours.
gallery.cta_text: Love what you see? Book your own display for Fall 2026!

faq.headline: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before you book. Don't see your question?

questions.a: We begin deliveries on September 21 and continue through to October 21. Peak delivery weeks (late September / early October) are our busiest, so we highly recommend booking early to secure your preferred delivery window!

questions.q: What areas of the Okanagan do you serve?
questions.a: We currently deliver to Kelowna and West Kelowna. If your area isn't listed, please reach out — we may be able to accommodate you!

questions.q: Do you pick everything up at the end of the season?
questions.a: Yes! End-of-season pickup is included in every package. We schedule pickups during the first two weeks of November. We'll come by and collect all pumpkins, gourds, corn stalks, and any other materials we provided. Everything is composted responsibly. You don't have to do a thing!

questions.q: How do I place an order?
questions.a: Simply fill out our order form on the Contact page, choose your package, select a delivery window, and we'll confirm everything via email within 24 hours. Payment is collected at the time of booking.

Absolutely! We partner exclusively with local Okanagan farms. We take great pride in supporting our local agricultural community. Keeping it local means fresher pumpkins and a smaller carbon footprint!

Yes! If you have a specific vision in mind — particular colours, styles, or arrangement preferences — just let us know in the order notes or contact us directly. We love creating custom displays and will do our best to accommodate your vision.

questions.q: What if a pumpkin goes bad or gets damaged?
questions.a: While pumpkins are natural products and will eventually age, we use only the freshest, highest-quality pumpkins to ensure they last throughout the season. If a pumpkin deteriorates unusually quickly within the first 2 weeks, contact us and we'll replace it at no charge.

questions.q: What if I need to cancel my order?
questions.a: We understand that plans change! Cancellations made more than 7 days before your scheduled delivery receive a full refund. Cancellations within 7 days are eligible for a credit towards next year's booking.

questions.q: Do you offer gift cards or gifting options?
questions.a: What a thoughtful idea! Yes, we offer gift cards that can be purchased in any denomination. Give the gift of a stunning fall porch to someone you love! Contact us at info@okanaganporchpumpkins.ca to purchase a gift card.

questions.q: Do you set up the display, or do I have to arrange it myself?
questions.a: We do everything! Our team delivers and professionally arranges your display right on your porch, steps, or entryway. You don't lift a finger. We style it beautifully so you can immediately enjoy the season.

contact.headline: Book Your Porch Pumpkins Today
contact.subtitle: Fill out the form and we'll confirm your order within 24 hours. Delivery spots fill up fast — don't miss out on the best fall display on your street!
contact.confirm_note: We'll confirm your order by email within 24 hours. Payment processed upon confirmation.
contact.success_text: We'll be in touch within 24 hours to confirm your delivery details. Get ready for the most beautiful porch on the block! 🎃
contact.season_banner_text: Delivery windows run from September 21 – October 21, 2026. End-of-season pickup is scheduled for the first two weeks of November. Book now to secure your preferred window!

about.headline_line1: Born From a Love of Fall in the
about.service_area_subtitle: We deliver across the beautiful Okanagan Valley. If your community isn't listed, reach out — we're always looking to expand!

cta_banner.subtitle: Secure your spot for Fall 2026 and be the talk of the neighbourhood all season long. Delivery windows run September 21st through October 21st.

packages_section.headline: Choose Your Package
packages_section.subtitle: Five packages to suit every porch and budget. All pumpkins are locally sourced from Okanagan farms and delivered between September 21 – October 21, 2026.
packages_section.note: All prices in CAD. Delivery window: September 21 – October 21, 2026. Service area excludes Osoyoos and Oliver. Contact us with any questions.
packages_section.addons_subtitle: Enhance any package with these optional extras. Just mention which add-ons you'd like when placing your order.
packages_section.cta_text: Ready to book? Mention your chosen package and any add-ons when you reach out.

package_detail.cta_text: Ready to bring the fall magic to your porch?

mini_faq.q: Can I customise the pumpkin colours?
mini_faq.a: Yes! Let us know your colour preferences when booking and we'll do our best to accommodate.

mini_faq.q: What if I need to change my delivery window?
mini_faq.a: Contact us as soon as possible. We'll accommodate changes subject to availability.

mini_faq.q: Are add-ons included in this package?
mini_faq.a: Add-ons are purchased separately. Visit the Packages page to browse available extras.

addons.name: Professional Porch Styling
addons.description: Have our team come arrange your Package #1 pumpkins into a beautifully styled display on your porch. The perfect upgrade for those who want the look without the fuss.

addons.name: Pumpkin Pick-Up & Composting
addons.description: We'll swing by in early November to collect and compost your pumpkins — no mess, no fuss. Sit back and enjoy the last of fall.

addons.name: 24 Miniature Pumpkins
addons.description: A beautiful basket of 24 mini pumpkins in a mix of colours — perfect for filling in gaps, lining steps, or decorating your indoor space.

addons.name: Extra Hay Bale
addons.description: Add an extra hay bale to your display for more height, texture, and that quintessential fall farmhouse look.

addons.name: Gift Cards
addons.description: Give the gift of fall! Our gift cards can be applied to any package or add-on. Perfect for neighbours, friends, or family who deserve a beautiful porch this autumn.

season.pickup_display: ♻️ Pickup: First two weeks of November

business.name: Okanagan Porch Pumpkins
business.tagline: Bringing the magic of fall to your front door.
business.description: Locally owned & operated in the beautiful Okanagan Valley.
about_paragraphs: Okanagan Porch Pumpkins started as a simple idea: why should decorating your porch for fall be stressful? We're a local family business right here in the Okanagan Valley — and like you, we adore this region's spectacular autumn season.

Every fall, the Okanagan transforms into a canvas of gold, amber, and deep red. We thought — what better way to celebrate that magic than by bringing the most beautiful pumpkins in the valley right to your front door?

We partner exclusively with local Okanagan farms to source the freshest, most gorgeous pumpkins of the season. By choosing us, you're not just getting a beautiful porch — you're supporting local farmers and keeping our community thriving.
business.hero_description: Okanagan Porch Pumpkins delivers stunning, professionally styled pumpkin arrangements right to your doorstep — so you can enjoy the beauty of the season without the hassle.

packages.name: The Doorstep Drop
packages.note: Add Professional Porch Styling to have us set it up for you!
packages.tagline: Fresh Okanagan pumpkins, straight to your door.
packages.best_for: DIY decorators and pumpkin lovers who want to arrange their own display.
packages.description: A handpicked selection of 30 fresh Okanagan pumpkins delivered right to your door. Perfect for the DIY decorator who just needs great pumpkins.

pumpkin_breakdown.type: Specialty pumpkins (heirloom varieties, unique textures, or interesting colours)

packages.name: The Cozy Stoop
packages.tagline: A warm fall welcome for any small porch or stoop.
packages.best_for: Townhomes, condos, and smaller porches that need a big fall impression.
packages.description: A charming, styled arrangement of 46 pumpkins and gourds that transforms a small porch or stoop into a warm fall welcome. Delivered and arranged by our team.

pumpkin_breakdown.type: Specialty pumpkins (heirloom varieties, textured, or uniquely coloured)

packages.name: The Harvest Welcome
packages.tagline: Stunning curb appeal — our sweet spot.
packages.best_for: Homeowners wanting a full, magazine-worthy display without going overboard.
packages.description: A full, lush porch display with 53 pumpkins, gourds, and fall accents. This is our sweet spot — stunning curb appeal for any home.

pumpkin_breakdown.type: Specialty pumpkins (heirlooms, unique textures, designer colours)

packages.name: The Grand Display
packages.tagline: Make your neighbours stop and stare.
packages.best_for: Large porches, wide front stoops, and those who want maximum fall impact.
packages.description: Make your neighbours stop and stare. A generous, layered arrangement of 76 pumpkins packed with colour, mums, and seasonal charm.

pumpkin_breakdown.type: Grand Prize pumpkins (jaw-dropping scale) — or 2 Grand Prize + 2 XL Jack-O'-Lanterns depending on porch size
Heirloom pumpkins (rare varieties in elegant tones)

packages.name: The Showstopper
packages.tagline: The ultimate fall statement. Custom. Curated. Unforgettable.
packages.best_for: Those who want a fully custom, premium display — quality and artistry over quantity.
packages.description: The ultimate fall statement. A custom-curated display of 42 premium, hand-selected pumpkins arranged into a magazine-worthy porch transformation that turns heads all season long.

pumpkin_breakdown.type: Specialty pumpkins (heirloom varieties, textured, or uniquely coloured)
Hay Bales (for height, structure, and visual anchoring)
Ornamental gourds throughout for a polished finish
